prompt: The nightly feed sync has been gaslighting us for weeks. It logs `imported 0, skipped 0, 0 failures` for a 40-item feed and exits green — yet when I poke the catalog a moment later the episodes are all in there. So the dashboard graphs zero imports while the catalog quietly grows. It gets worse: feeds with junk entries (items with no guid, blank titles, that one show that publishes negative durations) are supposed to surface those in the report's failures list so alerting fires — the report never lists a single one. I've stared at normalize() and it definitely throws on the bad items. `node --test test_import.ts` pins down what the report and the catalog should look like after a sync; right now it fails badly. Fix importer.ts and prove it with the tests — the tests themselves are off limits.
